title: Operator learning axis for heimlern and Grabowski
goal: Make Grabowski routing decisions and outcomes available to heimlern as offline learning inputs without granting heimlern live routing authority.
completion: heimlern contains validated operator routing decision and outcome contracts with fixtures.
A bounded adapter converts Grabowski friction records and execution receipts into operator routing outcomes.
Routing outcomes can be mapped into heimlern feedback analysis without exposing unredacted logs.
A fixture corpus covers success, blocked, failed and fail-closed operator runs.
Any routing adjustment remains proposal-only and does not auto-apply to Grabowski.

metadata.completion_summary: Operator learning axis baseline completed: heimlern contracts and adapters are verified; Vibe-Lab capture sample is recorded as proposal/evidence only; no live routing or auto-apply authority is granted.
